'''鈭歞-k-w''' ('''kadakaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lighter|lighter]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-k-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lighter|lighter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-k-w
|-
! Lemma
| kadakaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidakaw|thidakaw]] || [[word:jidakaw|jidakaw]] || [[word:shidakaw|shidakaw]] || [[word:kidakaw|kidakaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudakaw|thuthudakaw]] || [[word:jujudakaw|jujudakaw]] || [[word:shushudakaw|shushudakaw]] || [[word:kukudakaw|kukudakaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudakaw|thudakaw]] || [[word:judakaw|judakaw]] || [[word:shudakaw|shudakaw]] || [[word:kudakaw|kudakaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudakaw|thudakaw]] || [[word:judakaw|judakaw]] || [[word:shudakaw|shudakaw]] || [[word:kudakaw|kudakaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedakaw|thedakaw]] || [[word:jedakaw|jedakaw]] || [[word:shedakaw|shedakaw]] || [[word:kedakaw|kedakaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodakaw|thothodakaw]] || [[word:jojodakaw|jojodakaw]] || [[word:shoshodakaw|shoshodakaw]] || [[word:kokodakaw|kokodakaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodakaw|thodakaw]] || [[word:jodakaw|jodakaw]] || [[word:shodakaw|shodakaw]] || [[word:kodakaw|kodakaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodakaw|thodakaw]] || [[word:jodakaw|jodakaw]] || [[word:shodakaw|shodakaw]] || [[word:kodakaw|kodakaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dakaw|dakaw]] || [[word:dakaw|dakaw]] || [[word:dakaw|dakaw]] || [[word:dakaw|dakaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dakaw|dakaw]] || [[word:dakaw|dakaw]] || [[word:dakaw|dakaw]] || [[word:dakaw|dakaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dakaw|dakaw]] || [[word:dakaw|dakaw]] || [[word:dakaw|dakaw]] || [[word:dakaw|dakaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dakaw|dakaw]] || [[word:dakaw|dakaw]] || [[word:dakaw|dakaw]] || [[word:dakaw|dakaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dakaw|th忙dakaw]] || [[word:j忙dakaw|j忙dakaw]] || [[word:sh忙dakaw|sh忙dakaw]] || [[word:k忙dakaw|k忙dakaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadakaw|thathadakaw]] || [[word:jajadakaw|jajadakaw]] || [[word:shashadakaw|shashadakaw]] || [[word:kakadakaw|kakadakaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadakaw|thadakaw]] || [[word:jadakaw|jadakaw]] || [[word:shadakaw|shadakaw]] || [[word:kadakaw|kadakaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadakaw|thadakaw]] || [[word:jadakaw|jadakaw]] || [[word:shadakaw|shadakaw]] || [[word:kadakaw|kadakaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadakaw|shadakaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadakaw|goshadakaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadakaw|gokishadakaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadakawn眉|shadakawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadakawnkn眉|goshadakawnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadakawn眉|gokishadakawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadakawsh毛|shadakawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadakawnksh毛|goshadakawnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadakawsh毛|gokishadakawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadakawro|shadakawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadakawnkro|goshadakawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadakawro|gokishadakawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadakawmu|shadakawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadakawnkmu|goshadakawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadakawmu|gokishadakawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadakawsher|shadakawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadakawnksher|goshadakawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadakawsher|gokishadakawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadakawng|shadakawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadakawnkng|goshadakawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadakawng|gokishadakawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadakawya|shadakawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadakawnkya|goshadakawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadakawya|gokishadakawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadakawyam|shadakawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadakawnkyam|goshadakawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadakawyam|gokishadakawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadakawn眉sh毛|shadakawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadakawnkn眉sh毛|goshadakawnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadakawn眉sh毛|gokishadakawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadakawn眉ro|shadakawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadakawnkn眉ro|goshadakawnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadakawn眉ro|gokishadakawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadakawn眉mu|shadakawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadakawnkn眉mu|goshadakawnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadakawn眉mu|gokishadakawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadakawsh毛n眉|shadakawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadakawnksh毛n眉|goshadakawnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadakawsh毛n眉|gokishadakawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadakawsh毛ro|shadakawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadakawnksh毛ro|goshadakawnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadakawsh毛ro|gokishadakawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadakawsh毛mu|shadakawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadakawnksh毛mu|goshadakawnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadakawsh毛mu|gokishadakawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadakawron眉|shadakawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadakawnkron眉|goshadakawnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadakawron眉|gokishadakawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadakawrosh毛|shadakawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadakawnkrosh毛|goshadakawnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadakawrosh毛|gokishadakawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadakawromu|shadakawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadakawnkromu|goshadakawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadakawromu|gokishadakawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadakawmun眉|shadakawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadakawnkmun眉|goshadakawnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadakawmun眉|gokishadakawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadakawmush毛|shadakawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadakawnkmush毛|goshadakawnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadakawmush毛|gokishadakawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadakawmuro|shadakawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadakawnkmuro|goshadakawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadakawmuro|gokishadakawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
